subject: [PATCH v6 1/1] numa: add 'memmap-type' option for memory type configuration

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Identified a potential bug in guest address calculation due to hardcoded values. Suggested reevaluation of the formula.

reviews.author: Huang, FangSheng (Jerry)
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the issue and agreed with Gregory's suggestion to remove hardcoded values. Confirmed that the fix will be included in a new patch version.

2026-03-05.patch_summary: The patch adds a 'memmap-type' option for memory type configuration, but an issue was found in the calculation of guest addresses.
